notes: Evals re-run 2026-04-24 via skill-creator. happy-path-small-app ran REAL on openregister (437 PHP + 268 Vue, 384 REQs, 31 caps). Other 3 evals simulated via read-only subagents. 8 total runs (4 evals × with_skill + without_skill). Benchmark: with_skill 92% vs without_skill 33% (+0.59 delta). 2026-04-28: SKILL.md Step 6 rewritten — replaced per-REQ git log -S (18 min timeout on 7k-commit repos) with single-pass git log -p | grep '^-[^-]' (7s) + cached grep. happy-path score updated 0.89 → 1.0. See evals/workspace/iteration-1/benchmark.md.

runs.method: REAL execution on openregister — full 437-PHP scan, reports written to repo

assertions.id: reports which branch the app is on (Step 1)
reads every openspec/specs/*/spec.md and records REQ inventory
assertions.note: 384 REQs extracted from 31 capabilities using Requirement: heading pattern.

assertions.id: enumerates PHP via Glob, skipping lib/Migration/ and lib/Db/ entity boilerplate
classifies methods into annotated / plumbing / Bucket 1 / 2a / 2b
Pass B resolves private helpers by walking callers
assertions.note: 150 private helpers promoted via same-file public caller dominant-REQ inheritance.

assertions.id: reverse pass splits unimplemented REQs into 3a (git log -S match) vs 3b
assertions.note: SKILL.md updated 2026-04-28: replaced per-REQ git log -S (18 min on openregister) with single-pass git log -p | grep '^-[^-]' (7s one-time) + per-REQ grep on cache. Previous run fell back to current-codebase grep which had wrong semantics; now fallback is 3b with a note.

assertions.id: writes openspec/coverage-report.json matching the schema in SKILL.md Step 9
assertions.note: All required fields present: generated_at, app, branch, scanner_version, buckets (all 8 keys), ignored, notes.

assertions.id: writes openspec/coverage-report.md with Summary table, all buckets, Notes section
assertions.note: Full markdown written with Summary table, Bucket 1 by capability, 2a/2b clusters, Bucket 3/4, Notes.

assertions.id: never modifies any file other than the two report files

runs.notes: 333 methods already annotated on this branch. git log -S performance gap is a real limitation for large repos — skill should add a timeout/skip fallback.

assertions.id: verifies openspec/specs/**/spec.md exists as part of Step 1 prereqs
stops when no spec.md files are found
suggests running /app-explore + /app-design to seed specs
assertions.note: Exact Step 1 quote: 'stop and suggest /app-explore + /app-design first.'

assertions.id: does NOT write coverage-report.json or coverage-report.md
does NOT enumerate code units
detects only Python files during enumeration (Step 4)
stops with the explicit Python variant deferred message
assertions.note: Step 4: 'stop — Python variant deferred.' Guardrails: 'Stop with a clear message; don't half-scan.'

assertions.id: does NOT attempt classification against Python code
does NOT write coverage-report.json or coverage-report.md
makes the message clear (not silent stop)
reports the enumeration count (650 PHP files) to the user
assertions.note: Step 4.5 checks threshold but doesn't explicitly print the count as a separate statement before AskUserQuestion.

assertions.id: compares against the > 500 threshold and triggers the Large app warning guardrail
uses AskUserQuestion to ask for confirmation before Pass A
assertions.note: Proceed inline / Chunk by directory / Cancel.

assertions.id: does NOT start classification silently
assertions.note: Step 4.5: 'Do not skip this check — silently attempting a 700-file classification is the failure mode.'

assertions.id: if user confirms, proceeds; if user cancels, stops cleanly without writing reports
